---
pagetitle: "REVISÃO DE LITERATURA E FERRAMENTAS DE ANÁLISE"
title: ""
subtitle: ""
sidebar: true
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
lang: en
toc: true
---

```{r}
#| label: deps
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
```

:::{.column-body-outset}

```{css, echo = FALSE}
.justify {
  text-align: justify !important
}
```

::: {.justify}



## Data science tools and R packages

Code for CRVA integration will be included to facilitate reproducibility of the project.

Somos gratos pelo trabalho anterior que facilita a replicabilidade da pesquisa. A análise é conduzida com os seguintes pacotes R:

:::{#logo-r-packages layout-ncol=10}

[![](./content/img/R-packages/datazoom-amazonia.png)](https://www.econ.puc-rio.br/datazoom/english/dz_R.html){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

[![](./content/img/R-packages/geobr_logo_y.png)](https://github.com/ipeaGIT/geobr){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

[![](./content/img/R-packages/censobr.png)](https://ipeagit.github.io/censobr/){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

[![](./content/img/R-packages/readdbc.png)](https://github.com/danicat/read.dbc){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

[![](./content/img/R-packages/sidrar.png)](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/sidrar/vignettes/Introduction_to_sidrar.html){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

:::
#### Compartilhe em redes sociais:

```{=html}
<!-- AddToAny BEGIN -->
<div class="a2a_kit a2a_kit_size_32 a2a_default_style" data-a2a-icon-color="#FFDC02,black">

<a class="a2a_button_email a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_copy_link a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_linkedin a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_facebook a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_bluesky a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_x a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_threads a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_mastodon a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_whatsapp a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_dd a2a_counter" href="https://www.addtoany.com/share"></a>
</div>
<script async src="https://static.addtoany.com/menu/page.js"></script>
<!-- AddToAny END -->
```
